coll_1.subject: Let's collaborate!
coll_1.body:
Hi, I'm Oleg John. 
I came across your GitHub profile and wanted to reach out because I think it would be exciting to explore potential opportunities together.
I want to collaborate with you to find jobs, work together, and create profit.
I have experience in both software development and chemical engineering, and I’m very passionate about dedicating myself fully to any goal I take on.
I always aim to create real value and positive outcomes, never give any losses you.
If this sounds interesting, I’d be happy to connect here or on Telegram (@godsmiler0604). Looking forward to chatting with you!
